    constructor({ task, model, tokenizer = null, processor = null }) {

        this.model = model;
        this.tokenizer = tokenizer;
        this.processor = processor;

export class ImageToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(images, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);

        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        const toReturn = [];
        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims]
            const output = await this.model.generate({ inputs: batch, ...generate_kwargs });
            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
                skip_special_tokens: true,
            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))
            toReturn.push(decoded);
        }

        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
    }
}
```

export class DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(image, question, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // NOTE: For now, we only support a batch size of 1

        // Preprocess image
        const preparedImage = (await prepareImages(image))[0];
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImage);

        // Run tokenization
        const task_prompt = `<s_docvqa><s_question>${question}</s_question><s_answer>`;
        const decoder_input_ids = this.tokenizer(task_prompt, {
            add_special_tokens: false,
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        }).input_ids;

        // Run model
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            inputs: pixel_values,
            // @ts-expect-error TS2339
            max_length: this.model.config.decoder.max_position_embeddings,
            decoder_input_ids,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode output
        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output))[0];

        // Parse answer
        const match = decoded.match(/<s_answer>(.*?)<\/s_answer>/);
        let answer = null;
        if (match && match.length >= 2) {
            answer = match[1].trim();
        }
        return [{ answer }];
    }
}
```

export class ImageToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(images, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);

        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        const toReturn = [];
        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims]
            const output = await this.model.generate({ inputs: batch, ...generate_kwargs });
            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
                skip_special_tokens: true,
            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))
            toReturn.push(decoded);
        }

        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
    }
}

export class DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(image, question, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // NOTE: For now, we only support a batch size of 1

        // Preprocess image
        const preparedImage = (await prepareImages(image))[0];
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImage);

        // Run tokenization
        const task_prompt = `<s_docvqa><s_question>${question}</s_question><s_answer>`;
        const decoder_input_ids = this.tokenizer(task_prompt, {
            add_special_tokens: false,
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        }).input_ids;

        // Run model
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            inputs: pixel_values,
            // @ts-expect-error TS2339
            max_length: this.model.config.decoder.max_position_embeddings,
            decoder_input_ids,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode output
        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output))[0];

        // Parse answer
        const match = decoded.match(/<s_answer>(.*?)<\/s_answer>/);
        let answer = null;
        if (match && match.length >= 2) {
            answer = match[1].trim();
        }
        return [{ answer }];
    }
}
```

# Plan: Add `image-text-to-text` Pipeline to Transformers.js

## Context

The Transformers.js library needs a new `image-text-to-text` pipeline that accepts an image and a text prompt, then generates text output. This is the standard vision-language model pattern (e.g., "Describe this image", "What's in this photo?"). The model class `AutoModelForImageTextToText` already exists in `src/models.js` (line 8736) but has no corresponding pipeline. All changes are in a single file: `src/pipelines.js`.

## File to Modify

- **`src/pipelines.js`** — the only file that needs changes (4 insertion points)

## Implementation Steps

### Step 1: Add import for `AutoModelForImageTextToText` (line ~43)

In the import block from `'./models.js'` (lines 20–45), add `AutoModelForImageTextToText` alongside the other Auto model imports. Insert it after `AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction` (line 43), before `PreTrainedModel` (line 44):

```javascript
    AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,
    AutoModelForImageTextToText,    // <-- ADD THIS
    PreTrainedModel,
```

### Step 2: Add `ImageTextToTextPipeline` class (after line 2005)

Insert the new pipeline class **between `ImageToTextPipeline` (ends line 2005) and `ImageClassificationPipeline` (starts line 2007)**. Follow the exact JSDoc/typedef/class pattern used by `ImageToTextPipeline` and `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline`.

#### 2a. JSDoc typedefs and callback

```javascript
/**
 * @typedef {Object} ImageTextToTextSingle
 * @property {string} generated_text The generated text.
 * @typedef {ImageTextToTextSingle[]} ImageTextToTextOutput
 *
 * @callback ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback Generate text based on an image and a text prompt.
 * @param {ImageInput} image The image to use as context.
 * @param {string} text The text prompt describing what to do with the image.
 * @param {Partial<import('./generation/configuration_utils.js').GenerationConfig>} [options] Additional keyword arguments to pass along to the generate method of the model.
 * @returns {Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput>} An object containing the generated text(s).
 *
 * @typedef {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs & ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback & Disposable} ImageTextToTextPipelineType
 */
```

Key decisions:
- Uses `ImageInput` (single image, not batched `ImagePipelineInputs`) — same pattern as `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline`
- Uses `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` since it needs both tokenizer and processor — same as `ImageToTextPipeline` and `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline`
- Return type is `Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput>` (array of objects with `generated_text`)

#### 2b. Class-level JSDoc with example

```javascript
/**
 * Image Text to Text pipeline using any `AutoModelForImageTextToText`. This pipeline generates
 * text given an image and a text prompt.
 *
 * **Example:** Generate text from an image and a prompt w/ `onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft`.
 * ```javascript
 * const generator = await pipeline('image-text-to-text', 'onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft');
 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/cats.jpg';
 * const output = await generator(url, 'Describe this image in detail');
 * // [{ generated_text: '...' }]
 * ```
 */
```

#### 2c. Class definition

```javascript
export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(image, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // NOTE: For now, we only support a batch size of 1

        // Preprocess image
        const preparedImage = (await prepareImages(image))[0];
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImage);

        // Run tokenization
        const text_inputs = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        // Run model
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            ...text_inputs,
            pixel_values,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode output
        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(
            /** @type {Tensor} */(output),
            { skip_special_tokens: true },
        ).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));

        return decoded;
    }
}
```

- Signature: `_call(image, text, generate_kwargs = {})` — image first, text second (matches `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline`'s image+question pattern)
- Uses `prepareImages()` helper (already in file, line 86)
- Passes both `text_inputs` (containing `input_ids`, `attention_mask`) and `pixel_values` to `model.generate()`
- Decodes with `skip_special_tokens: true` and trims — same pattern as `ImageToTextPipeline`
- Returns `[{ generated_text: string }]` array

export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(image, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // NOTE: For now, we only support a batch size of 1

        // Preprocess image
        const preparedImage = (await prepareImages(image))[0];
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImage);

        // Run tokenization
        const text_inputs = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        // Run model
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            ...text_inputs,
            pixel_values,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode output
        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(
            /** @type {Tensor} */(output),
            { skip_special_tokens: true },
        ).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));

        return decoded;
    }
}
```
